title: 有馬記念の後に・至宝

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're heading down the slope of the second
corner and into the straightaway! Can the leader
maintain her pace?

text_block_list.name: Spectacled Man
text_block_list.text:
The 2,500-meter turf track at Nakayama
Racecourse has six turns. Large differences in
elevation demand endurance, making victory with
speed alone a tall task.

text_block_list.name: Man in Hoodie
text_block_list.text: What's with the sudden analysis?

text_block_list.name: Spectacled Man
text_block_list.text:
Heartbreak Hill is waiting right before the finish
too. You never know how the race will turn out
until the very moment they cross the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd holds their breath as they watch the
events unfold. That's when...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Rrraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And charging to the front is Satono Diamond!
Satono Diamond has taken the lead!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Grrraaahhh!

text_block_list.name: McQueen & Teio
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond dashes up the final slope,
leaving friend and rival alike in the dust...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Satono Diamond wins the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Dia. You've triumphed.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You've even defeated me in a long-distance race.
There's no longer any reason to question your
strength.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I think your ability has reached the level of the
"illustrious runner" you speak so frequently of.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I appreciate you saying so!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! I can't believe how strong the two of you
have gotten... You definitely exceeded my
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oooh, I'm so happy to hear you say that, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, this is far from over. If anything, we're
just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If you stop for even a second, you'll get left in the
dust. I fully intend on challenging both of you
again.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And I'm sure other talented Umamusume like you
will continue to emerge.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right! I won't let my guard down! I'll keep getting
better so that I can put smiles on everyone's
faces!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What about you, Dia? Have you decided on the
path you will take?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I intend to stand at the forefront of the
Satono family and make my mark on history.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My achievements will go down in the annals of
both the Satono family and the world of
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see. And what kind of path do you plan to carve
out for yourself?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A path to the top. I intend to shine brilliantly
above all others, as is befitting of the name
Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll climb to the peak of Japan, and every other
peak in the world, contributing to the growth of
Umamusume racing.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That is the kind of illustrious runner I, Satono
Diamond, shall be.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I may still be at the starting line, but this goal will
remain at the forefront of my mind as I advance
along that path.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, your ambition is wonderful indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then embark on your illustrious journey. Everyone
will be eagerly waiting you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah, Diamond! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You're the jewel of the Umamusume world!
Nothing shines brighter than Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I hope I can shine on forevermore.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As a daughter of the Satono family, I am
determined to do all I can to contribute to the
growth of Umamusume racing in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And as I run along that path...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I want to continue competing against you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Even if we enter different races. Even if our goals
and the paths we tread differ.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Even as we undertake our respective journeys...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I want to keep running alongside you, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Let's be together forever!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! From now until the end!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But before we get that far... I'm definitely gonna
beat you in our next race!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That's my next goal!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I won't make it easy for you!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah! They both rock! I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Spectacled Man
text_block_list.text:
I promise to keep an eye on both of your futures,
as well as the Satono family's!

text_block_list.name: Man in Hoodie
text_block_list.text:
Our hearts will always be with you! We'll continue
to cheer for you no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all! Your kind cheers of
encouragement truly mean so much...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm so delighted!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond cheerfully smiles as she
addresses her many fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In this moment, she's shining more brilliantly than
even the finest jewel—or even the most dazzling
diamond.
